sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113503" key="xaunwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαυν-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apt to make loose</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flabby,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σαρκός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.771b</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
